benchmark_results.query: What are the best museums in Lisbon?
benchmark_results.response:
**1.** 🏛️ **National Museum of Natural History and Science** - **⭐ 3.5/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: A combined natural history and science museum featuring historic scientific instruments, an observatory, botanical garden areas, and exhibits on biodiversity and the history of science in Portugal.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Consult the website
- 💡 **Tip**: Good for families and anyone interested in science history; check for special temporary exhibitions.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/national-museum-of-natural-history-and-science)**

**2.** 🏛️ **Museum of the Lisbon Geographical Society** - **⭐ 4.6/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: Housed in a 19th‑century society, the museum displays maps, nautical instruments and objects from Portugal’s maritime and colonial history — ideal for those curious about the Age of Discoveries.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Consult the website
- 💡 **Tip**: Entry is **free**; great as a shorter visit near other central attractions.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/museum-of-the-lisbon-geographical-society)**

**3.** 🏛️ **National Museum of Sport** - **⭐ 2.9/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: Exhibits celebrate Portugal’s sporting history, Olympic participation and notable athletes, with interactive displays and memorabilia.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Consult the website
- 💡 **Tip**: Interesting for sports fans and school groups; check for temporary themed exhibits.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/national-museum-of-sport)**

**4.** 🏛️ **Aqueducts and Mãe d'Água (Monumental Water Reservoirs)** - **⭐ 4.4/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: Historic aqueduct structures and the impressive Mãe d’Água reservoir tell the story of Lisbon’s historical water supply; nearby cultural spots include the Arpad Szenes–Vieira da Silva Foundation.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Today: Closed (check website for current hours)
- 💡 **Tip**: Combine with a walk in the neighbourhood and a visit to the nearby foundation and garden.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/aqueducts-and-mae-d-agua)**

**5.** 🏛️ **Water Museum - Barbadinhos Steam Pumping Station** - **⭐ 3.8/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: Set in historic pumping stations and industrial monuments, this museum explains Lisbon’s water infrastructure development from the 18th–19th centuries.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Today: Closed (check website for current hours)
- 💡 **Tip**: Architecture and industrial heritage lovers will appreciate the machinery and restored spaces.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/water-museum-barbadinhos-steam-pumping-station)**

**6.** 🏛️ **Santa Marta Lighthouse Museum** - **⭐ 4.2/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: A combined working lighthouse and small museum presenting the history of Portuguese lighthouses and coastal navigation.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Consult the website
- 💡 **Tip**: Offers unique views and a compact, focused collection — nice short visit near central Lisbon.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/santa-marta-lighthouse-museum)**

**7.** 🏛️ **Monument to the Discoveries (Padrão dos Descobrimentos)** - **⭐ 4.2/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: A landmark monument celebrating Portugal’s Age of Discoveries; includes an exhibition space and a viewpoint with panoramic views over the river.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Today: **10:00 - 19:00**
- 💡 **Tip**: Combine with a visit to Belém (Jerónimos Monastery, Belém Tower) in the same area.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/monument-to-the-discoveries)**

**8.** 🏛️ **Castle of the Moors** - **⭐ 4.5/5**
- 📝 **Brief description**: Historic medieval fortress offering expansive views; technically in the Sintra area (a short trip from Lisbon) and rich in medieval history and scenic walks.
- 📍 **Address**: Sintra (near Lisbon)
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Today: **09:00 - 18:30**
- 💡 **Tip**: Visit early to avoid crowds; combine with Pena Palace and Sintra historic centre.
- 🌐 **[More details](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/castle-of-the-moors)**

📌 **Source:** [*VisitLisboa Places*](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places)
expected_facts: List of top museums (e.g., Gulbenkian, MAAT, Museu Nacional do Azulejo)

benchmark_results.query: How do I get from Baixa-Chiado to Aeroporto?
benchmark_results.response:
### 🚌 Next Arrivals

**Real time**
- 🚇 **Baixa** → Chiado → Aeroporto Humberto Delgado · ⚠️ Line Status: · 🟢 Green Line: normal service · 🔴 Red Line: normal service · ⏳ Estimated total time: ~35 min · 🗺️ Your Metro Route: · 📍 Board at Baixa-Chiado · 🟢 Green Line - direction Telheiras · 🔄 Transfer at Alameda · 🔴 Red Line - direction Aeroporto · 🎯 Exit at Aeroporto · 🚶 Walk to Aeroporto Humberto Delgado · 🗓️ Next Metros (): · Station Baixa-Chiado: Direction Telheiras — ⏱️ Next Metro in: 31s | 4 min 31s | 10 min 9s · Station Alameda: Direction Aeroporto — ⏱️ Next Metro in: 1 min 44s | 7 min 1s | 13 min 1s

💡 **Quick tip**: From Aeroporto to Aeroporto Humberto Delgado, the final walk is short.

benchmark_results.query: What are the best museums in Lisbon?
benchmark_results.response:
**1.** 🏛️ **Museu da Marioneta (Puppet Museum)** - ⭐ 4.5/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: This very particular world is worth discovering, a place where the art of storytelling and acting, one of the first popular art forms, is told like a tale.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Check official website
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/museu-da-marioneta-puppet-museum)**

**2.** 🏛️ **Museum of Illusions** - ⭐ 4.2/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: Experience the impossible! Get ready to be mesmerized in our Lisbon Museum of Illusions!
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Check official website
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/museum-of-illusions)**

**3.** 🏛️ **Maritime Museum** - ⭐ 4.3/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: The Maritime Museum is a World of Discoveries. It reflects the importance of the experience and knowledge that the pioneering Portuguese navigators brought to the world.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Today: 10:00 - 17:00
- 💡 **Tip**: 20% discount with Lisboa Card
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/maritime-museum)**

**4.** 🏛️ **MUDE - Museu do Design** - ⭐ 4/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: Get to know MUDE and its permanent programme on the evolution of national and international design through its various expressions (product, fashion, graphic).
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Check official website
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/mude-museu-do-design)**

**5.** 🏛️ **Geological Museum** - ⭐ 4.7/5
- 📝 **Brief description**:
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Check official website
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/geological-museum)**

**6.** 🏛️ **Royal Treasure Museum. Crown Jewels** - ⭐ 4.7/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: A Museum with unique items that is really worth visiting.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Today: 10:00 - 19:00
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/museu-do-tesouro-real)**

**7.** 🏛️ **Wine and Vine Museum - Bucelas** - ⭐ 4.5/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: An insight into winegrowing in the region.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Check official website
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/wine-and-vine-museum-bucelas)**

**8.** 🏛️ **Words Factory**
- 📝 **Brief description**: The "Words Factory" library, designed by Miguel Arruda, is a stunningly unusual and beautiful piece of architecture.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Check official website
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/words-factory)**

**9.** 🏛️ **Setúbal Museum (Convent of Jesus)** - ⭐ 4.1/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: This museum's collections offer an intriguing mix of art, history, archaeology and numismatics.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Today: Closed
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/setubal-museum-convent-of-jesus)**

**10.** 🏛️ **National Museum of Sport** - ⭐ 2.9/5
- 📝 **Brief description**: Take your mark, get set, go… to the Museu Nacional do Desporto, which is commemorating the centenary of Portugal's participation in the Olympic Games.
- 📍 **Address**: Lisbon
- 🕒 **Opening hours**: Check official website
- 🌐 **[Official Website](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places/national-museum-of-sport)**

📌 **Source:** [*VisitLisboa Places*](https://www.visitlisboa.com/en/places)
expected_facts: List of top museums (e.g., Gulbenkian, MAAT, Museu Nacional do Azulejo)
